After <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HoggerGnollFrenzyDecayCoolup,Duration"/></c> seconds of not gaining Rage, it begins to quickly decay.
HoggerSecretStash: Every <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,HoggerHoardapultSecretStashTalentDynamitePersistent,PeriodicPeriodArray[0]"precision="1"/></c> seconds, Hoardapults' Loot Hoard randomly launches Ez-Thro Dynamite, prioritizing nearby enemy Heroes.<n/><n/>Every <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,HoggerHoardapultSecretStashTalentMeatPersistent,PeriodicPeriodArray[0]"precision="1"/></c> seconds, it also launches a chunk of Meat towards Hogger.

HoggerShockwave: After <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,HoggerShockwave,CastIntroTime"precision="2"/></c> seconds, slam the ground, sending out a shockwave that travels in a long line. Enemies hit by the initial slam take <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,HoggerShockwaveInitialDamage,Amount"/></c> damage and are Stunned for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HoggerShockwaveInitialStun,Duration"precision="2"/></c> seconds. Enemies only hit by the shockwave take <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,HoggerShockwaveSecondaryDamage,Amount"/></c> damage and are Stunned for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HoggerShockwaveSecondaryStun,Duration"precision="3"/></c> seconds.
HoggerStaggeringBlow: Swing your chain in a wide arc, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,HoggerStaggeringBlowDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to enemies hit and knocking them away. If an enemy hits terrain, deal an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,HoggerStaggeringBlowProcDamage,Amount"/></c> damage, Stun for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HoggerStaggeringBlowProcStun,Duration"precision="2"Player="0"/></c> seconds, and gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,HoggerStaggeringBlowCollisionProcGnollFrenzyRage,VitalArray[Energy].Change"/></c> Rage.
IllidanBetrayersThirst: Basic Attacks heal for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,IllidanBetrayersThirstLifesteal,Modification.VitalDamageLeechArray[Life].KindArray[Basic]*100"/>%</c> of damage dealt and reduce Ability cooldowns by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.
IllidanBetrayersThirstHuntersOnslaughtTa: Basic Abilities heal for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,IllidanHuntersOnslaughtLifeLeech,Modification.VitalDamageLeechArray[Life].KindArray[Ability]*100" precision="2"/>%</c> of the damage they deal. This bonus is doubled versus Heroes.

IllidanBetrayersThirstThrillOfBattle: Basic Attacks heal for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,IllidanBetrayersThirstLifesteal,Modification.VitalDamageLeechArray[Life].KindArray[Basic]*100"/>%</c> of damage dealt and reduce Illidan's Ability cooldowns by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.

IllidanEvasion: Evade enemy Basic Attacks for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,IllidanEvasion,Duration" player="0" precision="2"/></c> seconds.

IllidanEvasionShadowShieldTalent: Evasion grants a <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,IllidanShadowShieldShield,DamageResponse.ModifyLimit"/></c> point Shield for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,IllidanShadowShieldShield,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds.
IllidanEvasionSixthSenseTalent: While active, Evasion grants Illidan <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,IllidanSixthSenseStack,ArmorModification.ArmorSet[Hero].ArmorMitigationTable[Ability]"/></c> Spell Armor against the next <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,IllidanEvasionApplySixthSenseTalentStacks,Count"/></c> sources of Spell Damage, reducing their damage by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,IllidanSixthSenseStack,ArmorModification.ArmorSet[Hero].ArmorMitigationTable[Ability]"/>%</c>.
IllidanFieryBrand: Every <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Validator,IllidanHas2StacksFieryBrandTarget,Value+1"/>rd</c> attack against the same Hero deals an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,IllidanFieryBrandDamage,VitalFractionMax[Life]"/>%</c> of their maximum Health as damage.
IllidanFlightOftheBetrayer: <s val="StandardTooltip"><n/>After being out of combat or not using abilities for <s val="StandardTooltipDetails"><d ref="Behavior,FlightoftheBetrayerCooldown,Duration" player="0"/></s> seconds, gain <s val="StandardTooltipDetails"><d ref="100*Behavior,FlightoftheBetrayer,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</s> increased Movement Speed.
IllidanMetamorphosis: Transform into Demon Form at the target location, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,NewMetamorphosisDamage,Amount"/></c> damage in the area. Lasts for <c val="#TooltipNumbers">18</c> seconds.
IllidanMetamorphosisDemonicFormTalent: Permanently remain in Demonic Form. Metamorphosis also increases Attack Speed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> and reduces the duration of Stuns, Roots, and Slows by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>. Illidan can now mount in Demonic Form.

IllidanSweepingStrikeBatteredAssaultTale: Increase Sweeping Strike's Basic Attack damage bonus duration from <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,IllidanSweepingStrikesDamageBuffNoStacking,Duration" player="0"/></c> to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,IllidanSweepingStrikesDamageBuffNoStacking,Duration+Talent,IllidanMasteryBatteredAssaultSweepingStrike,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value" player="0"/></c> seconds. IllidanSweepingStrikeBuffFace: Basic Attack damage increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,IllidanSweepingStrikesDamageBuffNoStacking,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Basic]*100" player="0"/>%</c>
IllidanSweepingStrikeImmolationTalent: After using Sweeping Strike, burn nearby enemies for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,IllidanSweepingStrikesImmolationDamage,Amount"/></c> damage a second for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,IllidanSweepingStrikesImmolation,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds.

IllidanTheHunt: Charge to target unit, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,IllidanTheHuntDamage,Amount"/></c> damage on impact and stunning for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,IllidanTheHuntStun,Duration" player="0"/></c> second.

IllidanUnendingHatredTalent: Quest: Minion kills grant Basic Attack Damage. Hero Takedowns grant Basic Attack Damage.Reward: After gaining increased Basic Attack Damage, receive an additional Basic Attack Damage.
ImperiusAngelicArmaments: Summon a ring of blazing swords that grants <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ImperiusAngelicArmamentsShieldBehavior,DamageResponse.ModifyLimit"/></c> Shield for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ImperiusAngelicArmamentsShieldBehavior,DurationOverride[0].Duration" precision="2" player="0"/></c> seconds.</n></n>If the Shield lasts the full duration, this ability can be reactivated within <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ImperiusAngelicArmamentsCasterBehavior,Duration-Behavior,ImperiusAngelicArmamentsCasterBehavior,Period" precision="2" player="0"/></c> seconds to launch <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ImperiusAngelicArmamentsInitialPersistent,PeriodCount"/></c> swords toward an area, each dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ImperiusAngelicArmamentsMissileDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to the first enemy hit.
ImperiusAngelicArmamentsHeavenlyHost: Shields granted by Angelic Armaments no longer expire, and on initial activation, nearby allied Heroes gain a Shield that absorbs <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ImperiusAngelicArmamentsHeavenlyHostShield,DamageResponse.ModifyLimit"/></c> damage.<n/><n/>If a Shield granted to an allied Hero lasts <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ImperiusAngelicArmamentsHeavenlyHostShield,Period"/></c> seconds, it fires <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ImperiusAngelicArmamentsHeavenlyHostShield,PeriodCount"/></c> sword at a nearby enemy, prioritizing closest Heroes, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ImperiusAngelicArmamentsHeavenlyHostDamage,Amount"/></c> damage.

ImperiusCelestialChargeImpalingLight: Celestial Charge deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ImperiusCelestialChargePostImpactDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[ImpalingLight].Modifier*100"/>%</c> more damage to Heroes, reduced by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Accumulator,ImperiusImpalingLightDamageAccumulator,Scale*100"/>%</c> for each additional Hero hit. ImperiusCelestialChargePatheticMortals: Stunning enemy Heroes with Celestial Charge reduces their Movement Speed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,ImperiusCelestialChargePatheticMortalsSlowBehavior,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> and their damage by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ImperiusCelestialChargePatheticMortalsDamageReduction,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Ability]*(-100)" precision="2" player="0"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ImperiusCelestialChargePatheticMortalsDamageReduction,Duration" precision="2" player="0"/></c> seconds.
ImperiusCelestialSwiftness: Gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ImperiusCelestialChargeCelestialSwiftnessMovementSpeedBuff,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*100" precision="2" player="0"/>%</c> Movement Speed for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ImperiusCelestialChargeCelestialSwiftnessMovementSpeedBuff,Duration" precision="2" player="0"/></c> seconds after casting Celestial Charge. Gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ImperiusCelestialChargeCelestialSwiftnessAttackSpeedBuff,Modification.AdditiveAttackSpeedFactor*100" precision="2" player="0"/>%</c> Attack Speed for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ImperiusCelestialChargeCelestialSwiftnessMovementSpeedBuff,Duration" precision="2" player="0"/></c> seconds for each Hero Stunned with Celestial Charge.

ImperiusMoltenWrath: Molten Armor's radius is increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,ImperiusMoltenWrath,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value/Effect,ImperiusMoltenArmorSearch,AreaArray[0].Radius*100" player="0"/>%</c>, and it always strikes <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ImperiusMoltenArmorMultiSearch,AreaArray[0].MaxCount-1"/></c> additional targets, even if there are Heroes in range.
ImperiusPressForward: Gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ImperiusPressForwardArmorBuff,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/></c> Armor while being healed by a Regeneration Globe.
